name: ghidra-data
title: ghidra-data
description:
FID databases for Ghidra
This package contains FID databases and data type archives that improve
Ghidra.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ghidra-data because FID databases for Ghidra.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ghidra-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ghidra-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ghidra-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
